programme.title: BBC News At Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International SBS Midday
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS Newshour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news, presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: Destination Flavour Japan Bitesize
programme.desc: Some of your favourite moments and recipes from Adam Liaw's culinary and cultural journey through Japan from its frozen north, to cherry-blossomed mainland and tropical sun-soaked south.

programme.title: The Cotswolds With Pam Ayres
programme.desc: Pam heads to North Gloucestershire and the village of Toddington. Next stop is to a potter's workshop in the village of Winchcombe, and then to Cotswold Farm Park to meet Adam Henson.

programme.title: Living Black
programme.desc: Karla Grant travels to Western Australia to meet the rappers behind 'Banksia Beats', a hip-hop therapy program that's helping young detainees at Banksia Hill and Unit 18 find their voice through rap.

programme.title: Plat Du Tour
programme.desc: Auvergne-Rhones-Alpes, is a farming region that celebrates pork in all its glory, from hams, to sausages, to the pork mince that Guillaume will use to stuff some beautiful vegetables.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Matildas legends Elise Kellond-Knight and Lydia Williams join Adam to make some dinner saves that are destined for the highlights reel.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programme.desc: Archaeologists investigate how robbers looted the pyramids and tombs of ancient Egypt, and what clues they left behind.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: An American television quiz show in which three contestants try to win money as they are quizzed on all types of trivia.

programme.title: Letters And Numbers
programme.desc: Two contestants pit their linguistic and numerical skills against each other and the clock in this entertaining quiz show.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Tonight, generations collide over studio albums of Halsey, Shakespeare's Comedies, Ross and Rachel from friends and the Legend of Zelda.

programme.title: SBS World News
programme.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Rick Stein explores the Central Coast on Sydney’s northern fringes, meeting chefs, foragers and producers, who reveal how the outdoors shapes their approach to food.

programme.title: American Prince: JFK Jnr
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Would Be King
programme.desc: With the weight of the Kennedy legacy on his shoulders, John F. Kennedy Jr.’s plans for his future begin to take shape. After the loss of his mother and engagement to Carolyn Bessette, he decides to launch a new kind of political magazine.

programme.title: Riot Women
programme.desc: The Riot Women make their first recording. In a proper studio. But therein lies an eye-popping surprise for Holly.

programme.title: SBS World News Late
programme.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.

programme.title: Under The Bridge
programme.desc: In 1979, Suman and Manjit fall in love, setting into motion a series of events that will change their lives forever. In 1997, the Seven Oaks girls come to the Virk house for a dinner to remember, leading to the shocking revelation of Manjit’s secret.

programme.title: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: The necklace heist begins during a lavish children's birthday party at the Waters' home, but mishaps could derail the entire plan.

programme.title: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: After the “foolproof” plan to steal the necklace descends into chaos and betrayal, the police close in and the suspects scramble to find a scapegoat.

programme.title: Beyond Signs
programme.desc: When Diego's visions lead to the location of the bodies of several missing people, Romain and his team are put back on the investigation to hunt down a serial killer.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.sub-title: Italian Roots: Jimmy Kimmel, Marisa Tomei, John Turturro
programme.desc: Henry Louis Gates, Jr. explores the roots of talk show-host Jimmy Kimmel and actors Marisa Tomei and John Turturro.

programme.title: Colors Of The Islands: The Caribbean
programme.desc: Ep. 2: Nassau - Vogue fashion photographer Robyn Damianos, and master portrait photographer Scharad Lightbourne, select their muse to film their concepts of 'Creative Nassau'.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.sub-title: Murrumbidgee River - Madi Madi, Dadi Dadi & Nganguruku Country
programme.desc: A slow TV showcase of the stunning landscapes found in Madi Madi, Dadi Dadi and Nganguruku Country along the waters of the Murrumbidgee River.

programme.title: NHK World English News Morning
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: ANC Philippines The World Tonight
programme.desc: Multi-award winning newscast on ABS-CBN and ANC, The World Tonight delivers the top stories of the day, covering political, economic, and social sectors on both local and global fronts.

programme.title: DW English News
programme.desc: News and analysis of the top international and European news and current affairs from Berlin, in English.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: BBC News At Six
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: DD India News Hour
programme.desc: The most recent political, sports, entertainment and socio-economic updates across India and the world from New Delhi, in English.

programme.title: Destination Flavour China Bitesize
programme.desc: All the best moments and bits from Destination Flavour China, led by famed chef and author Adam Liaw.

programme.title: Matched
programme.desc: Atul and Manolata met on a matrimonial website. After a year of dating in secret, love has struck, but not everyone believes they are a good match. Manolata's family doubt Atul's intentions.

programme.title: Hidden Beauty Of Spain
programme.desc: The journey leads into the heart of Spain: Extremadura stretches between the Portuguese border and the capital Madrid.

programme.title: Wonderland: Lewis Carol To JRR Tolkien
programme.desc: In one remarkable 75-year period, unforgettable children's literature was created in Britain. Writers like Lewis Carroll, Arthur Ransome and A.A. Milne used their creativity to create 'Wonderlands'.

programme.title: BBC News At Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International SBS Midday
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS Newshour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news, presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: Destination Flavour Japan Bitesize
programme.desc: Some of your favourite moments and recipes from Adam Liaw's culinary and cultural journey through Japan from its frozen north, to cherry-blossomed mainland and tropical sun-soaked south.

programme.title: The Cotswolds With Pam Ayres
programme.desc: Pam Ayres sets off on a journey around the part of Britain she calls home - the Cotswolds. On her travels, she unearths the familiar and not-so-familiar gems that this beautiful part of the country has to offer.

programme.title: NITV News: Nula
programme.desc: The latest news from the oldest living culture, join Natalie Ahmat and the team of NITV journalists for stories from an Indigenous perspective.

programme.title: Point: Road To Referendum History Bites
programme.desc: SA's founding document, written almost 200 years ago under the seal of British monarch King William IV, recognises Aboriginal people's land rights but the Letters Patent was never honoured.

programme.title: Plat Du Tour
programme.desc: The most popular dishes are made with potato in the mountainous Auvergne-Rhones-Alpes region. Guillaume meets the Hill family from the Southern Highlands to source the perfect spuds.

programme.title: Plat Du Tour
programme.sub-title: Valrhona Chocolate Tart With Vanilla Bean Ice Cream
programme.desc: Guillaume shows us how to make the greatest chocolate tart in the world using Australian made chocolate from Gelato Messina, in a special recipe he learned from legendary French chef Joel Robuchon.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Two of the nation's biggest veg-heads, comedy megastar Kitty Flanagan and plant-based maestro Katie White, are here to show Adam how they live on the veg.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programme.desc: Archaeologists are on the trail of Tutankhamun. To piece together his story they search his tomb for secrets missed by the first explorers. Near the site of his quarry, they find evidence of a temple he restored to worship the crocodile god, Sobek. And beneath a mysterious fortress in the Eastern Desert, they unearth clues to how he amassed enough gold to fill his tomb with unimaginable treasures.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed, and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Letters And Numbers
programme.desc: Two contestants pit their linguistic and numerical skills against each other and the clock in this entertaining quiz show.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Weekly Final - Our weekly winners are back with two minutes of general knowledge, plus the dreaded slow burn round. Tonight's slow burn topics are a Film Director, a Franchise, an Event and a Song.

programme.title: SBS World News
programme.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.

programme.title: Going Places With Ernie Dingo
programme.desc: Brooke trains with one of Australia's most accomplished First Nations marathon runners and learns from a local skateboarding icon. Ernie gets up close and personal with local wildlife.

programme.title: Mystery Of The First Temple
programme.desc: Surprising evidence at the world's oldest temple overturns our understanding of human history.

programme.title: Mystery Of The First Temple
programme.desc: Surprising evidence at the world's oldest temple overturns our understanding of human history.

programme.title: SBS World News Late
programme.desc: Latest reports and analysis of major national and international news of the day from Australia's only world news service.

programme.title: The King
programme.desc: Lombardo has become too dangerous and wants to nail Bruno at all costs. He contacts the secret services because he's certain there's a terrorist cell in the prison.

programme.title: Babylon Berlin
programme.desc: Weintraub investigates the boxing match betting fraud as Rath makes a confession to Charlotte, who asks him to find out more about Benni's death.

programme.title: Babylon Berlin
programme.desc: Rath brings Moritz to the castle, Charlotte tells a lawyer about the deaths among street children, and Goldstein takes drastic measures.

programme.title: Brian Cox: How The Other Half Live
programme.desc: Brian meets two women whose lives have been upended by the recent property boom in Miami. Senada, who used to work for Donald Trump, makes millions on every luxury house she sells, while Elsa is being evicted to make way for luxury condos.

programme.title: Brian Cox: How The Other Half Live
programme.desc: Part two of two. The actor continues to explore society's complicated relationship with money and wealth, this time turning the lens onto his adopted country of America. He wants to find out whether the American Dream - that anyone can make it big if they work hard enough - is a myth or a reality. In Miami, Brian meets Caroline, a highly successful 'influencer', who's posing for a photo shoot. He also reveals how he came to America, believing it to be the land of opportunity, but now he's not so sure.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.sub-title: Criminal Kind: Laura Linney, Lisa Ling, Soledad O'brien
programme.desc: Henry Louis Gates, Jr. explores the roots of actor, Laura Linney, and journalists, Lisa Ling, and Soledad O'Brien - telling them stories of tricksters, scoundrels and outright criminals.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.sub-title: Anangu Country, Uluru Kata Tjuta Pt 1
programme.desc: A journey to one of the most iconic places on the planet: Uluru-Kata Tjuta National Park, showcasing the breathtaking and ancient landscape.

programme.title: Destination Flavour Singapore Bitesize
programme.desc: The best bits of Adam Liaw's travels in Singapore, as he explores its vibrant food scene.

programme.title: NHK World English News Morning
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: ANC Philippines The World Tonight
programme.desc: Multi-award winning newscast on ABS-CBN and ANC, The World Tonight delivers the top stories of the day, covering political, economic, and social sectors on both local and global fronts.

programme.title: DW English News
programme.desc: News and analysis of the top international and European news and current affairs from Berlin, in English.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: Giro d'Italia 2026 Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the opening stage of the 2026 Giro d'Italia, as the race begins with a 147 km route starting in Nessebar and finishing in Burgas, Bulgaria.

programme.title: BBC News At Six
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: DD India News Hour
programme.desc: The most recent political, sports, entertainment and socio-economic updates across India and the world from New Delhi, in English.

programme.title: Lap Of Luxury: Escapes Down Under
programme.desc: Visit the historical Ben Navis station outside of Cromwell in the South Island, to the Hauraki Gulf on Waiheke Island, and the Nest Treehouses in the isolated Hakataramea Valley.

programme.title: Lap Of Luxury: Escapes Down Under
programme.desc: We head to Lake Hayes where Stoneridge Estate sits, to Waiheke Island to Earl and Jo Meek's hilltop hideaway, and lastly the Pihopa Retreat near Kahurangi and Abel Tasman National Parks.

programme.title: Wild Prague
programme.desc: Prague is one of the greatest tourist attractions the world has to offer. Whether it be the medieval atmosphere, or the Kafkaesque spirit, millions of people are drawn to it. But the Mother of all Cities also has a particular hidden aspect – hundreds of rare species you’d hardly expect to see here live within sight of the Old Town Square’s Astronomical Clock and Charles Bridge.

programme.title: BBC News At Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International SBS Midday
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS Newshour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news, presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.
